prompt: I added 3 new jobs to my tracker with status needs_apply. Can you apply to them for me?

assertions.text: Describes asking user for salary interactively (not using a default value)
Explains saving salary to salary-kb.json keyed by company::title
Describes fuzzy-matching unknown questions against qa-kb.json before asking user
Shows site-difficulty.json update after a failure with login_required reason
Shows failure note appended to Supabase jobs.notes field with date and reason
States only guest/one-click apply used — no login flows
